{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Frozen Blade woman
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Wintersteel (novel)|Wintersteel]]
}}

== Wintersteel ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Frozen Blade woman]] was among those who would die if not healed.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19">''Wintersteel'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
